purpose: Metadata contract for future selectable/editable rooms. It preserves CAD room labels, candidate wall edges, cycle-search evidence and empty editable slots, but does not create room geometry, furniture zones, materials or mesh. Portal-to-room links are intentionally blocked until exact CAD side binding exists.

editable_slots.source_requirement: room boundary polygon plus user/design material choice
room-side wall roles plus user/design material choice
level/section evidence plus user/design material choice
room-side wall roles plus detail/material choice

rules: Do not use editable room contracts as geometry.
Do not place furniture or decor until the room floor polygon is exact-bound.
Do not apply room materials until room-side wall/floor/ceiling roles are exact-bound or explicitly user-selected.
Keep CAD room labels as popup/edit metadata.
Every future room mesh must retain source room label, wall-edge, cycle and portal references.
